name: tritonai-installer
description: Cross-platform installer for TritonAI-managed UCSD coding tools.

scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.renderer.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const file of ['index.html','styles.css','campus-roads-overlay.png']) fs.copyFileSync('src/renderer/'+file,'dist/src/renderer/'+file)"
scripts.test: npm run build && node dist/scripts/validate.js && node dist/scripts/test-renderer-progress.js && node dist/scripts/verify-npm-age.js && node dist/scripts/test-installer-version-marker.js && node dist/scripts/test-config-writers.js && node dist/scripts/test-skills.js && node dist/scripts/test-plugins.js && node dist/scripts/test-windows-environment-ownership.js && node dist/scripts/test-windows-upgrade.js && node dist/scripts/test-install-transactions.js && node dist/scripts/test-macos-harness-identity.js && node dist/scripts/test-windows-signing.js && node dist/scripts/test-release-contract.js && node dist/scripts/test-publish-github-release.js && node dist/scripts/test-clean-install-dry-run.js
scripts.prepare:managed-config: npm run build && npm run prepare:managed-config:compiled
scripts.prepare:skills-vendor: npm run build && npm run prepare:skills-vendor:compiled
scripts.prepare:plugins-vendor: npm run build && npm run prepare:plugins-vendor:compiled
scripts.prepare:codex-cli-vendor:win: npm run build && npm run prepare:codex-cli-vendor:win:compiled
scripts.prepare:codex-cli-vendor:all: npm run build && node dist/scripts/prepare-codex-cli-vendor.js all
scripts.package:win-installer: npm run build && npm run clean:release-output:compiled -- win && npm run prepare:managed-config:compiled && npm run prepare:plugins-vendor:latest:compiled && npm run prepare:t3code-desktop-vendor:win:compiled && npm run prepare:codex-cli-vendor:win:compiled && npm run prepare:skills-vendor:compiled && node dist/scripts/windows-signing.js

author: UC San Diego
